title: My Journey in an Alternate World Episode 19 Subtitle
description:
Young Chen Xiaofan entered an alternate world after he accidentally swallowed the Chaos Orb, and became Young Master Chen, the most popular man in Muyun City. Although he was adored by all the women in Muyun City, he was useless because he couldn't cultivate. With his mind wanting to return to his home world, he gave up his stable lifestyle as a young master and against the wishes of his family, determined to go down the path of a cultivator.

Chen Xiaofan muda memasuki dunia alternatif setelah dia secara tidak sengaja menelan Chaos Orb, dan menjadi Tuan Muda Chen, pria paling populer di Kota Muyun. Meskipun dia dipuja oleh semua wanita di Kota Muyun, dia tidak berguna karena dia tidak bisa berkultivasi. Dengan pikirannya yang ingin kembali ke dunia asalnya, dia melepaskan gaya hidupnya yang stabil sebagai tuan muda dan bertentangan dengan keinginan keluarganya, bertekad untuk menempuh jalan seorang kultivator.
